title: Add Author Section to README
description: Insert an author section into the project's README file to provide attribution and contact details as appropriate.
details: Open the README.md file in the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end (or in a logical position if a convention exists). Include the author's name and, if applicable, a contact email or GitHub profile link. Ensure the formatting matches the rest of the README (use Markdown headings and lists as appropriate).
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md file to confirm the author section is present, correctly formatted, and contains accurate information. Optionally, preview the file in a Markdown viewer to ensure proper rendering.
